findings.title: Authentication Weakness Detected
findings.description: High-risk keywords related to authentication have been detected, indicating potential weaknesses in the authentication flow that could lead to unauthorized access.
assumptions: Authentication mechanisms are not fully secure.

evidence.excerpt: Detected auth risk keywords in 5 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough security review of the authentication flow.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance authentication mechanisms and perform security testing.

findings.title: Potential PII Handling Issues
findings.description: The recent deployment may have altered how PII is handled, especially for anonymous users, raising concerns about compliance with data handling policies.
assumptions: Changes in the ranking algorithm may affect data collection.

evidence.excerpt: Significant Drop in Search Relevance for Anonymous Users

recommendations: Review data handling practices to ensure compliance with PII policies.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a legal review of PII handling practices.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Gaps
findings.description: Accessibility risk keywords detected indicate potential non-compliance with WCAG standards, which could hinder usability for users with disabilities.
assumptions: Accessibility features may not be fully implemented.

evidence.excerpt: Detected accessibility risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct an accessibility audit to identify and remediate gaps.

metadata.mitigation: Implement necessary changes to meet WCAG standards.

findings.title: Increased Support Volume Due to Irrelevant Results
findings.description: The spike in support tickets indicates a critical pain point where users are unable to find relevant information efficiently, leading to frustration and potential churn.
assumptions: Irrelevant search results are causing user dissatisfaction.

evidence.excerpt: Support ticket volume has increased threefold since the v2.4.1 deployment

recommendations: Prioritize resolution of search relevance issues to reduce support volume.

metadata.mitigation: Enhance search algorithms to improve relevance.

summary: Identified 4 risks (1 accessibility, 1 privacy, 1 security, 1 user experience). 2 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (3 blockers, 1 warnings).
